title: ervum pisiforme
intro: Ervum pisiforme, also known as Lathyrus sativus, is a type of annual legume native to the Indian subcontinent. It is a plant with a rich history, used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ervum pisiforme include its potential to reduce cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. Ervum pisiforme can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, including arthritis and digestive issues.
